name: compose
_note: forecast.compose folds live world state (embodied climate baselines + faction strategy + forward-sim + drift) into a 24h forecast and (default persist:true) writes it to world_forecasts. World-public — with a live migrated DB + the assassin owner actor, {} returns ok:true and a real forecast object (window_hours:24; weather is null on a barren world, never invented). Never no_db.
